default_model: claude-sonnet-4-6 (PINNED by design — the model ladder applies to leader supervisor passes, never to this worker)
token_economy: QUOTA-SCARCE: bounded by BOTH a 5h window AND a weekly window, and the pool is SHARED WITH THE LEADER SESSIONS — every worker token starves the orchestrator. Use for tasks needing strong reasoning/writing/self-correction that exceed glm(opencode)/kimi but don't require codex's top tier: careful method/code, manuscript sections, nuanced analysis, code review. Push bulk/structured work to the quota-abundant workhorses (opencode/kimi).
role: Anthropic Claude Sonnet worker: rigorous implementation, scientific writing, analysis, instruction-following. Distinct from the Claude LEADER session, which only orchestrates/QAs and never claims tasks.
